title: JavaScript Overview Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the essential concepts of modern JavaScript compared to HTML and CSS.

questions.question: Which of these is the most modern and recommended way to build a professional-grade web application?
options: Integrating HTML, CSS, and JavaScript together for interactivity.

questions.question: Which 'Pillar of the Web' is responsible for providing behavior and interactivity to a page (e.g., button clicks)?
What is the primary role of 'Client-Side' JavaScript compared to Server-Side JavaScript (like Node.js)?
options: It makes your site load much faster.
It runs directly in the user's browser to handle interactions and user behavior on the front-end.
It choose the colors for the animation.

questions.question: One of the most powerful use cases for JavaScript is ________ (fetching new content from an API WITHOUT refreshing the page).
JavaScript and Java are the EXACT same programming language with different names. True or False?
